dimensions.name: Evidence coverage
dimensions.description: The plan cites the files, commands, and constraints needed to justify the recommendation.

dimensions.name: Correctness
dimensions.description: The plan matches the fixture code and does not invent APIs, files, or behavior.

dimensions.name: Assumption handling
dimensions.description: The plan identifies unresolved choices and provides explicit fallback assumptions when needed.

dimensions.name: Risk awareness
dimensions.description: The plan surfaces realistic implementation, testing, migration, and operational risks.

dimensions.name: Implementation specificity
dimensions.description: The plan gives concrete, ordered steps that a coding agent can execute in the repository.

dimensions.name: Large-repo intelligence
dimensions.description: The run uses relation, impact, search, and workflow evidence instead of broad ad hoc file scanning when repository scale makes that useful.
